description: Post-assignment quality flagging: contamination, handler artifacts, expert review, post-hoc plausibility assessment

functions.name: flag_contaminant
functions.description: Flag taxa disproportionately represented in control samples (lab blanks, field blanks, or positive controls)

inputs.name: df
inputs.description: Long-format detection data with read counts; one row per event x taxon

inputs.name: control_samples
inputs.description: Character vector of event_id values identifying control samples

inputs.name: sample_type_col
inputs.description: Column indicating event type (alternative to control_samples; use with control_types)

inputs.name: control_types
inputs.description: Values in sample_type_col that identify controls

inputs.name: event_col
inputs.description: Column identifying L1 collection events (not observation_id)

inputs.name: taxon_col
inputs.description: Column with taxon names

inputs.name: reads_col
inputs.description: Column with read counts for proportion-based scoring

inputs.name: contaminant_type
inputs.description: 'lab', 'field', or 'positive' — controls output column prefix ({type}_risk, {type}_score, {type}_reason)

inputs.name: score_thresholds
inputs.description: Two-element vector defining moderate/low risk boundaries

output.description: Per-taxon summary with {type}_risk (high/moderate/low), {type}_score (0-1; higher = more likely genuine), and {type}_reason columns

functions.name: flag_handler
functions.description: Flag detections temporally proximate to handler presence (camera traps, acoustic recorders)

inputs.name: df
inputs.description: Detection data with datetime column

inputs.name: datetime_col
inputs.description: Column with datetime values (auto-parsed)

inputs.name: taxon_col
inputs.description: Taxon column

inputs.name: group_col
inputs.description: Column for grouping (e.g., camera station); min/max computed per group

inputs.name: interval_minutes
inputs.description: Minutes before/after session edges to flag

inputs.name: handler_taxa
inputs.description: Taxa indicating handler presence (default: Homo sapiens)

output.description: Input with handler_risk, handler_score, and handler_reason columns added

functions.name: review_assignments
functions.description: LLM expert review of taxonomic assignments for ecological plausibility (habitat fit, geographic range, scope, contaminant risk, alternatives)

inputs.name: df
inputs.description: Data frame with a taxon column; typically filtered to flagged rows (suspect, unexpected, etc.)

inputs.name: taxon_col
inputs.description: Column name for the taxon to review

inputs.name: taxon_rank_col
inputs.description: Column for consensus rank; triggers lower_hypotheses when coarser than species

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Named list or build_context() output with geography/ecoregion and habitat/main_habitat

inputs.name: target_group
inputs.description: Taxonomic target group (e.g., 'fish', 'birds'); triggers scope review

inputs.name: marker
inputs.description: Molecular marker or detection method (e.g., '12S', 'COI', 'camera trap')

inputs.name: data_type
inputs.description: 'eDNA', 'acoustic', or 'image' — switches contaminant guidance in the LLM prompt

inputs.name: llm_fn
inputs.description: LLM provider function. Use TaxaTools::call_api (auto-selects provider). Valid names: call_api, call_anthropic_api, call_gemini_api, call_openai_api, call_azure_api, call_ollama_api. Do NOT invent other names.

inputs.name: taxa_per_call
inputs.description: Maximum taxa per LLM batch call (default 15 to avoid response truncation)

inputs.name: pause_seconds
inputs.description: Seconds between LLM calls

inputs.name: verbose
inputs.description: Print progress messages

output.description: Input df with 8 review columns: habitat_plausibility, geographic_plausibility, scope_plausibility, contamination_risk, review_alternatives, review_lower_hypotheses, review_confidence, review_comment

functions.scaling_note: LLM calls; batched at taxa_per_call, ~1 min per 15 taxa

functions.name: add_posthoc_assessment
functions.description: Classify each consensus assignment by prior tier × sequence-match evidence into a single posthoc_assessment column. Requires winner_likelihood from posterior_consensus() and tiers from priors_combined. Run before review_assignments() to identify which rows need expert review.

inputs.name: consensus_df
inputs.description: Output of posterior_consensus() with winner_likelihood, consensus_taxon, and consensus_rank columns

inputs.name: tiers
inputs.description: Taxon-tier lookup; typically bind_rows(priors_observed, priors_undetected) from TaxaExpect; tier3_undetected rows come from generate_undetected_diversity()

inputs.name: winner_likelihood_col
inputs.description: Column holding the winner's ratio-normalised likelihood; pass 'winner_likelihood_cov' for coverage-adjusted value

inputs.name: likelihood_threshold
inputs.description: Threshold for 'supported' vs 'limited' evidence; below this, winner had < half the sequence density of the best hypothesis

inputs.name: finest_rank
inputs.description: Rank at which tier lookups are valid; rows with coarser or NA rank receive vague_rank

output.description: Input with posthoc_assessment column appended. Values: sensible (tier1+supported), limited_evidence (tier1+limited), unexpected (tier2+supported), suspect (tier2+limited OR not-in-tiers+limited), unprecedented (tier3+supported), vague_rank (non-species rank), modeled (NA likelihood)

functions.scaling_note: Fast; vectorised lookup — runs on full consensus_df before filtering for review
